reviews.review_description:
Bro, you could you couldn’t even control the bike. It’s meant to go fast but you can only go like two no like 0 miles in an hour and you can barely control the bike.


￼
It's really bad steering is the worst

I usually have a high tolerance towards getting motion sick in VR. This one immediately gave it to me. 
I think this suffers from what a lot of VR "sims" do wrong. Which is aiming at real-world physics instead of targeting the "fun" part of biking (flowy trails for example)
I really dislike how fast you hit the "out of control" limit. I think auto accelerate would be better. Define a "trail speed" for different segments along the course and let my bike mostly auto-accelerate towards that, me braking should slow me down obviously. Maybe a "boost" button that has a refilling stamina for jumps and to use after braking too hard to get back to trail speed faster (and let you get above trailspeed temporarily).  It should vignette as I speed up. As I stay in the "good" part of a berm keep my speed up. If I'm wobbly or miss it I should slow down a bit. Trying to focus on enjoying it and fluttering my thumb isn't really what mtb feels like (I ride about 50mi/week). This feels more like learning to drive a stick shift than flying through the woods on a magic machine
I don’t get how to play the game and there not a lot to do

reviews.review_title: ver uncomfortable and hard to control

reviews.review_description: Hi very enjoyable game the graphics first class. Mechanics pretty decent. ..only one problem ,not every time but when I have completed  a race. the game crashes as I say sometimes. ,so have to turn off and then reload to play on. But still find it a challenge to get anywhere near the fast times  much better then expected well done the devs. Just wish it did not crash

If you are a fan of mountain biking, this is an amazing VR experience. Downhill Bike simulates riding a mountain bike down a rugged path.
 
Become one with nature and conker that hill. The controls in Downhill Bike feel great, just like holding onto a set of handle bars. 

The bike give you a great feel of being on a bike. I even found myself standing up time to time when starting to peddle or bunny hopping.

This is a free demo on SideQuestVR and I would highly recomene3d trying it out.

Bike fans will love this one.

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/Ow_11rBjjGM
Great idea for a game. I miss real mountain biking, but the motion sickness is real. Even with the helmet on had to quit after about a minute. Really really rough.

reviews.review_title: I see a lot of potential
reviews.review_description: There’s a lot of things they have to fix like making the person taller on the bike and a new mechanic in general it’s hard to control but if they put work into it they could make a great game I have never seen a mtb game on oculus but if they work on it, it could be a really good game
It is hard to control overall it isn’t even that I wouldn’t recommend getting it ￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! Downhill bike is one of our first games and unfortunately, we couldn't fix the glitches while developing others. However! we are planning a big release within this year, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: It give me a feeling I’m actually riding a bike and it feels like happy wheels in first person without you know not the actual things in happy wheels

developer_response.body: Haha without the actual things in happywheels! Thanks for your review

reviews.review_description: Is ok but if you are Motion sicknesses DONT PLAY THIS GAME but it was so fun￼
Is hard to turn and is little bit hard or is chust not my thing

From a long time mountain biker, i am really happy that someone started to build this game and can't wait to give it a 5* once the physics are way less floaty, and the following get fixed: after landing, the controller position offsets every time, the handlebar / turning isn't responsive enough (i prefer one handed riding as it feels a bit more responsive).
Still very happy it exists but can't wait to play it in it's further updates
